description: CSV parse/encode node configuration for converting between CSV strings and structured data

columns.description: Column names to use. In parse mode without headers, these become the keys. In encode mode, these define column order.

hasHeaders.description: (parse mode) Whether the first row contains column headers (default true)

mode.description: Operation mode: 'parse' to convert CSV to array of objects, 'encode' to convert array of objects to CSV

source.description: Path expression or literal for the input data

title: CSV Parse/Encode Node Config
